markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review monthly performance and align on Q1 2026 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Sessions and non-branded impressions grew MoM, but new contact acquisition dropped significantly. The cause is under investigation, with a leading theory of over-indexing on informational content.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Q1 Strategy:** The focus is doubling down on the developer persona with a new strategy: create integration pages for emerging tech and partner with those companies for backlinks in their official docs.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 7 articles were delivered last week, with 7 more scheduled for this week. Publishing continues until Christmas week, with a quiet period the final week of the year.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=35.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** To clear a growing review queue, Vivek will tag Theo on Slack with Airtable links for all pending content reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)

## Topics

### Monthly Performance Review (Nov)

  - [**Traffic & Impressions:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Sessions and engaged sessions increased MoM.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Non-branded impressions also increased, maintaining a positive trend.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [Top 10 pages are all blog posts, including recent publications.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [**Conversions & Contacts:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [Overall converted events declined MoM.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [A significant drop in new contact acquisition was observed in HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Over-indexing on informational content → attracting top-funnel users.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [**Action:** Investigate the cause and consider creating more bottom-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Cohort & Page Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [Cohort performance remained stable, with no major ranking volatility.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
      - [GrowthX-generated integration pages lost the most sessions MoM.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Low total addressable market (TAM) for these specific integrations.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
      - [**Action:** A refresh report is due this week to confirm this.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [Scrunch data shows Strapi remains well ahead of Contentful and Sanity across all tracked queries.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)
      - [No major ranking positions were lost in key categories.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)

### Content Pipeline & Issue Resolution

  - [**Comparison Page Table:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
      - [The large table will be removed.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
      - [The agency is building a backend toggle to control its display on a page-by-page basis.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [**Comparison Page Videos:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
      - [Theo will review the list of pages needing video refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [**FAQ Components:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [Capabilities & Features pages are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [Integrations pages are being fixed (resolving layout issues from long FAQs). **ETA: Friday.**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [**Integration Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [New pages are being generated in parallel with the FAQ updates and will be published this week and next.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Internal cross-linking is also being fixed to improve SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [**LLM "About Strapi" Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [The page is not rendering markdown formatting (e.g., H2s) correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Theo will investigate the cause.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)

### Q1 2026 Content Strategy

  - [**Core Focus:** Double down on the developer persona with a "fewer but better" content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**New Initiatives:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Backlink Generation:** Create integration pages for emerging tech and partner with those companies for backlinks in their official docs.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [**Model:** Successful partnerships with Expo and Resend.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**"Strapify" (Codename):** Identify popular templates and add Strapi as the backend.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
          - [**Collaboration:** Paul (code) + GrowthX (blog post).](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [**Agency Persona:** Research agency-specific queries to fill content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
          - [**Action:** Vivek to check Octave for agency persona data.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
      - [**Social Listening:** Create timely content on new releases (e.g., Next.js 16) and answer questions on subreddits.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The Kappa/Octolens content gap integration is on hold.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
      - [**Reason:** Engineering is prioritizing reusable, tool-agnostic workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Likely unblocked when Atlas opens to customers in late Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

### Image Workflow & Feedback

  - [**Process:** Enhanced workflow uses a Figma template and generates images based on highlighted text in the content.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [**Feedback:**](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [**Quality:** Images are a significant improvement and are highly technical.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
      - [**Quantity:** Only one image per post is being included.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**Action:** Vivek will ask Usman to increase the number of images per article.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [**Tracking:** Victor will grant GrowthX Hotjar access to analyze user interaction with the new images via heatmaps.](https://fathom.video/share/Cd59vUe8bhqNubMVTJgVBxLRq6216Y9c?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
